subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath singled Himself out through the sovereignty of His oneness and distinguished Himself through the dominion of His uniqueness, Who hath ever been sanctified from [3.5s]... ...Lo, through His pervasive Will, He hath built the House of His Cause on the foundation of utterance and the basis of exposition
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی توحد بسلطان وحدانیته و تفرد بملیک فردانیته الذی کان مقدسا عن
subcodes.subjects: @Hands of the Cause, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
